description_long: This guard rail consists of a continuous, thick, black metal tube bent into a symmetrical 'M' shape, with two vertical posts connected by a central arch. Each post is anchored into a large, hexagonal concrete base, providing stability and weight. The metal surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light along its curves. The rail is designed to act as a physical barrier, commonly used to prevent vehicles or pedestrians from crossing into restricted areas. The ends of the rail are blunt and terminate directly into the concrete bases, with no additional end treatments. There are no visible reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A sturdy, black, M-shaped metal guard rail with two vertical posts anchored in hexagonal concrete bases and a smooth, glossy finish. Designed as a robust urban barrier, it lacks reflective markings and features blunt ends.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full M-shaped profile, both vertical posts, and the concrete bases.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the rail and the thickness of the metal tube.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the M-shape and concrete bases.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the curvature of the metal tube.
